description:
**Milestone:** Dashboards + Loki Log Aggregation

Create 4 provisioned Grafana dashboards as JSON files: 1) System Health — CPU, memory, disk, network from node-exporter. 2) Deploy Pipeline — deploy frequency, success rate, duration, rollback count (from CI webhook or custom metrics). 3) Agent Performance — active agents, execution duration, cost by model, success/failure rate, tokens used. 4) Feature Velocity — features completed per day, cycle time, backlog depth, throughput. Add a dashboard provisioning config. Each dashboard should use variables for time range and include meaningful panel titles and descriptions.

**Files to Modify:**
- monitoring/grafana/provisioning/dashboards/dashboard.yml
- monitoring/grafana/provisioning/dashboards/system-health.json
- monitoring/grafana/provisioning/dashboards/deploy-pipeline.json
- monitoring/grafana/provisioning/dashboards/agent-performance.json
- monitoring/grafana/provisioning/dashboards/feature-velocity.json

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All 4 dashboards auto-load on Grafana startup
- [ ] System Health shows CPU, memory, disk, network panels
- [ ] Deploy Pipeline shows deploy frequency and success rate
- [ ] Agent Performance shows cost tracking and model distribution
- [ ] Feature Velocity shows throughput and cycle time
- [ ] No manual Grafana UI configuration required

**Complexity:** large
title: Pre-Provisioned Grafana Dashboards
